summary: Iteration 88 - Hispalo Predict feature fully tested. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly (desktop and mobile). Prediction algorithm working with real order data.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns status=ok
BACKEND: GET /api/customer/predictions returns 200 with predictions and summary
BACKEND: Predictions include product_id, product_name, image, status, days_until_next, confidence, purchase_count
BACKEND: Predictions sorted correctly (overdue first, then due, soon, upcoming)
BACKEND: Summary counts match actual prediction statuses
BACKEND: Empty predictions returned for admin user (no customer orders)
BACKEND: Predictions include valid dates (last_purchased, predicted_next)
BACKEND: Predictions include avg_interval_days
FRONTEND: Homepage loads at /
FRONTEND: Customer login works (test@example.com)
FRONTEND: Dashboard /dashboard shows predict section with actionable items
FRONTEND: /dashboard/predictions renders HispaloPredictions component
FRONTEND: Header shows 'Hispalo Predict' with product count
FRONTEND: Summary pills show vencidos/pronto badges correctly
FRONTEND: Prediction cards display product name, image, progress bar
FRONTEND: Confidence badges (Alta/Media/Baja) displayed
FRONTEND: 'Recomprar' button exists on each card and is clickable
FRONTEND: 'Predict' nav item in customer sidebar (desktop)
FRONTEND: Mobile bottom nav has 'Predict' item
FRONTEND: Mobile predictions page renders correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Good implementation - prediction algorithm properly calculates intervals from order history
Correct status sorting: overdue > due > soon > upcoming
Confidence calculation based on standard deviation is correct
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Responsive design works well on both desktop and mobile
Recomprar button correctly calls cart/add endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing order data for test@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hispalo Predict feature fully implemented and tested. Backend predictions API at /api/customer/predictions returns predictions with status, confidence, and summary. Frontend at /dashboard/predictions shows prediction cards with Recomprar buttons. Test user test@example.com has 4 predictions (1 overdue, 3 soon). Mobile nav includes Predict item in bottom bar.
